title: IncidentPayload
description: Input payload for starting an incident investigation. Required by the Step Functions workflow, Scope Builder, and all trigger paths.

incidentId.description: Unique identifier for the incident. Used to correlate all downstream outputs (e.g. inc-20260320-001).

service.description: Name of the impacted service resolved from incident context snapshot at trigger time.

region.description: AWS region where the incident is occurring (e.g. eu-west-1).

signalType.description: The type of incident signal (e.g. latency_spike, error_spike, availability_drop). Describes what anomaly was observed, not how the investigation was triggered.

contextId.description: Incident context identifier used by the context-first trigger path.

triggerModel.description: Trigger payload model used by runtime.

contextSnapshot.description: Immutable minimal context snapshot captured at trigger time for context-first runs.

triggerSource.description: How the investigation was initiated. 'cloudwatch_alarm' = automated alert from CloudWatch; 'manual' = operator-initiated via API or UI.

severity.description: Incident severity level (e.g. sev1, sev2). Optional metadata for triage context.

windowStart.description: Start of the incident time window (ISO 8601 UTC). Defines the period the investigation focuses on.

windowEnd.description: End of the incident time window (ISO 8601 UTC). Must be after windowStart.
